headline: Nokia Alliances With Orange And RUCKUS Test AI Network Rerating
summary: Nokia Oyj (HLSE:NOKIA) is expanding its AI driven network offering through new alliances with Orange SA and RUCKUS Networks. With Orange, Nokia plans to co develop AI powered 5G radio access network technologies using its anyRAN software and NVIDIA AI infrastructure. With RUCKUS Networks, Nokia is providing early access to an integrated Wi Fi 7 and Fiber Optical LAN solution aimed at high bandwidth enterprise use cases. Nokia enters these agreements with its share price at €8.946 and a...
